summary: #49286 remains the best canonical PR for the Discord native system-message handling family. #49308 is a narrower, related same-author PR that should stay open because instant close is disabled and maintainers may still prefer the targeted path; no merge, fix, or close action is planned.

actions.reason: Representative #49286 remains the strongest canonical thread because it covers the full root-cause family and includes regression coverage, but it is not merge-ready in this dedupe-only run.
Keep #49308 open as a related narrower implementation candidate rather than closing it in a dedupe-only run.
